title: nepeta teydea
intro: Nepeta teydea, also known as Spanish catmint, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family, Lamiaceae, native to the Iberian Peninsula. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, antiseptic, and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Nepeta teydea include its ability to soothe digestive issues, relieve menstrual cramps, and ease respiratory problems such as coughs and colds. In herbal preparations, Nepeta teydea can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to promote relaxation and alleviate various health complaints.
